column1: # close-boundary.tsv — boundary closing for the "foo" directive
# (open="foo<", close=">") over the mini test grammar, with the default
# close rules (list,elem,map,pair). The close token ">" terminates any
# enclosing list/map opened inside the directive as well as the directive
# itself, so an explicit container need not be closed with its own
# bracket before ">". A bare ">" outside a directive is still an error.
# --- ">" closes an open list and the directive together ---
# --- ">" closes an open map and the directive together ---
# --- the close token outside any directive is unexpected ---
